notes: Solid, well-featured Snake implementation with smooth animation, death flash effect, eyes on head, audio, high score persistence, and win condition — minor issue is the `ia()` call inside keydown before AudioContext is needed, but overall nearly flawless.
Excellent implementation with great visuals and sound, though it lacks an input queue for rapid keypresses, leading to occasional dropped inputs.
Complete and polished basic Snake with title/pause/restart/high score, but strict self-collision against the tail and a few minor implementation quirks keep it short of excellent.
